overview: RegenCen offers physician-led hormone therapy and regenerative medicine for midlife men and women. Treatment includes personalized bioidentical hormone replacement, testosterone replacement, and medical weight loss support delivered through consultations, blood testing, and in-office procedures.
highlights: Hormone pellet therapy (5-6 month sustained release)
Medical weight loss program with GLP-1 medications
PRF regenerative medicine and NAD+ IV therapy
targetAudience: Men and women in midlife seeking to address hormonal shifts, low energy, or to optimize hormone levels for improved strength, focus, and overall health.
